response.justification: Candidate's C++ exposure is limited to roughly 6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 working on LabWindows/CVI, far below the 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ required. There is no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. Core stack is JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which does not align with this role.
strengths: Strong overall software engineering tenure with senior/staff titles
Proven communicator via workshops, talks, and teaching
Solid testing and CI/CD discipline (TDD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, none recent
No SQL Server or Oracle experience indicated
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No financial services / fixed income domain
